# sakura_addon_search (Data Source)

Get information about an existing Addon Search.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "sakura_addon_search" "foobar" {
  id = "addon-resource-id" // sakura- prefix
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The ID of the Addon Search

### Read-Only

- `deployment_name` (String) The deployment name of the Addon Search
- `location` (String) The location of the Addon Search
- `partition_count` (Number) The partition count of the Addon Search.
- `replica_count` (Number) The replica count of the Addon Search.
- `sku` (Number) The SKU of the Addon Search.
- `url` (String) The URL of the Addon Search
